welcome.tagline: Turn the page at the next station.
welcome.seoLine: A commute time map covering 1,831 stations in Greater Tokyo — with rent data, neighborhood guides, and AI picks.
welcome.consentLead: Before continuing, please confirm that you
welcome.consentBold: are interested in life in the Greater Tokyo area

page1.title: Names You Don't Know
page1.p1: In and around Tokyo, there are 1,843 stations.
page1.p2: At night, their lights spread out like a sea of names.
page1.p3Italic: You search online for a place to move——
page1.p5: The screen fills with rows of station names you have never heard of.
page1.p6Red:
But what light the morning begins with,

when your life lands at that station —

a name alone will never tell you.

page2.title: Another Map
page2.p1: Measured in commute time, the map begins to change its colors.
page2.p2: 1,843 stations start telling you how many minutes away they stand.
page2.p3Dim: Near stations in green, distant ones in vermilion.

page3.title: Your Turn
page3.dimP:
Somewhere in Tokyo, surely,

one station you don't know yet is waiting — yours alone.

AI and reviews are only signposts.

With every scroll of the screen,

what sets out is your own curiosity.

destinationAsk.heroLimitNote: New recommendations limited to once every 24 hours.

aiWizard.q1FallbackNote: AI advisor supports all 1831 stations as destinations. Search above or pick from popular below.
aiWizard.q1BackToMap: ← Prefer to explore yourself? Back to map
aiWizard.q6Title: How much do you value safety?

aiResultGrid.heading: Twenty Places for You
aiResultGrid.fallbackNote: * Showing simplified alternative recommendations due to AI connection
aiResultGrid.cachedNote: * Showing past recommendations for the same criteria
aiResultGrid.disclaimer: Reference info by ChatGPT. Final decisions are yours.

transferFilter.oneSub: Arrive with at most one transfer

destinationPicker.addSecondTitle: Add a second destination (show stations reaching both)
destinationPicker.secondChipTitle: Second destination (colors show the longer of the two)

correctionReporter.triggerNormal: Is this time off? Report the correct one →
correctionReporter.submitError: Submission failed. Please try again later.
correctionReporter.customInfoBody: Correction reports for custom destinations ({destLabel}) are coming soon.
correctionReporter.customInfoNote: Currently, community corrections cover commute times to the 30 major destinations (Shinjuku, Shibuya, Tokyo, Ikebukuro, Shinagawa, etc.).
correctionReporter.rangeHint: * Enter within ±{tolerance} min of the {algorithm} min estimate

cookieConsent.messageLead: This site uses cookies and may track purchases / applications via affiliate links. See

legal.jaPrevailsNotice: Legal information on this site (Specified Commercial Transactions Act disclosure, privacy policy, etc.) is provided in Japanese, as required under Japanese law. The Japanese text is authoritative.

toLanding.title: Commute Time Map to {name}
toLanding.metaDescription: A commute-time map of 1,831 stations across Greater Tokyo with {name} as the destination. Find your neighborhood with AI picks, rent estimates, area profiles, and community reviews.
toLanding.fallbackDescription: This map page is for people choosing where to live based on their commute to {name}. Kayoha computes the commute time from each of 1,831 stations in Greater Tokyo to {name} using real GTFS timetables, colored in 5-minute steps for instant reading. Explore the map alongside rent estimates, area profiles, and community reviews to find a neighborhood that fits you.

toIndex.title: Destination Guides — Find a Home by Commute
toIndex.metaDescription: Guides for 30 major Tokyo commute destinations — Shinjuku, Shibuya, Tokyo Sta. and more: stations within 30 minutes, rent estimates, and neighborhood deep dives from Kayoha.
toIndex.lead: Pick your commute destination to see stations within 30 / 45 minutes, rent estimates, and an in-depth area guide.
